query: What is the maximum age of documents allowed for compliance-related queries?

v1.content:
NEXUS AI — Data Quality Requirements for AI Systems
Document ID: DATA-001 | Version: 1.7

1. Data Freshness
Documents ingested into the knowledge base must not be older than 90 days for
compliance-related queries. Non-compliance documents may have a maximum age of 180 days.

2. Source Quality
All knowledge base documents must originate from approved internal sources.
External sources require sign-off from the Legal team before ingestion.

v2.content:
NEXUS AI — Data Quality Requirements for AI Systems
Document ID: DATA-001 | Version: 2.0 (UPDATED 2026-03-01 — Legal review)

1. Data Freshness
POLICY UPDATE: Documents ingested into the knowledge base must not be older than
60 days for compliance-related queries. This applies to all compliance use cases.
Non-compliance documents may have a maximum age of 120 days.

2. Source Quality
All knowledge base documents must originate from approved internal sources.
External sources require sign-off from the Legal team before ingestion.
